name: freemygpt
description: HTTP gateway that lets ChatGPT and any LLM drive any local MCP server via simple GET requests

plugins.name: freemygpt
plugins.description: HTTP gateway that exposes any local MCP server (or Codex CLI) to ChatGPT's built-in browse tool and any other GET-only agent runtime. Hybrid: MCP stdio backends by default, Codex subprocess via a bundled adapter, bearer token auth in the query string.
